description: Rhythmic, pulsed delivery that leverages pattern regularity to sustain engagement. Shorter pauses maintain momentum while emphasis on structural transitions signals context shifts. Interruptible to accommodate task-switching. Designed for users with ADHD who benefit from predictable rhythm without monotony.
intended_use: Users with Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder
Task-switching environments requiring quick re-entry points
Voice systems where momentum supports focus retention
